name: Redcheeks Inc.
description:
As a door-to-door spanker, your job is to go to the homes of residents with low social scores and give them spankings to set them straight. Set in the dystopian year of 2757, there are plenty of unique characters and adventures to be had in this spank-focused adult RPG.

You must use your tablet to navigate between your jobs for the day! It will recommend actions for each client, as well as provide character information.

NOTE: TURN TEMP UP TO 1.3 OR ELSE IT WILL GENERATE THE SAME TWO WOMEN OVER AND OVER!
NOTE: TURN TEMP UP TO 1.3 OR ELSE IT WILL GENERATE THE SAME TWO WOMEN OVER AND OVER!
NOTE: TURN TEMP UP TO 1.3 OR ELSE IT WILL GENERATE THE SAME TWO WOMEN OVER AND OVER!


Drink plenty of water, it's good for you.

2025 update: The mods replaced the image without letting me back it up so it's gone forever now. Just imagine it.
